name: Calendar
description: Integrated calendar with Google Calendar connection
author: Moldable Team

capabilities.name: Calendar events
capabilities.description: Allow approved apps to read calendar events in this workspace.

scopes.name: Today's calendar events
scopes.description: See event titles, times, and availability for today's schedule in this workspace.

scopes.name: Calendar events in a date range
scopes.description: See event titles, start and end times, and availability for a requested date range so the app can show upcoming schedule context.
